findings.notes: normal-only label/provenance contamination check
automated/recurring source rows require both batch_id and job_id, human-entered rows must keep them blank, and source_trust must trust automated rows
document-level debit/credit balance in integer KRW
line side validity
normal baseline may contain self-approval context, but direct SoD violation markers are reserved for abnormal overlays
normal RBAC scope (user-level): junior single-process; senior+ at most one compatible dual assignment; anomalous pairs and junior-Treasury are overlay-only
approved_by users must exist and have can_approve_je=true; approval-limit exceedance must be present but bounded as a natural control exception

metric.reference_policy: same-role reference reuse must be 0; cross-role shared references are flow-link diagnostics

findings.notes: document number uniqueness/number range and same-role reference reuse
DuplicateDetector retained pair artifact must not contain same-document line pairs
counterparty/account/text/document coherence
VAT GL line existence and base/tax ratio; empty tax population is not PASS
tax treatment must follow transaction archetype/evidence, not random/reference markers
true noise rate from generator stats; lexical Latin scans are diagnostic only
amount round-grid dominance and exact amount concentration
stable accounts such as tax, interest, depreciation/amortization, and rent must not swing by implausible account-level YoY ratios

normal ERP account determination should reuse concrete debit-credit account pairs; L4-04-like rare pairs must not be dominated by subtype fragmentation. NOTE: this check reads the RESULT only, so it can be satisfied by post-hoc rewriting of gl_account -- ACC02 checks the METHOD and is the one that blocks that
tax-bearing lines must post to a tax account; VAT receivable/payable have dedicated accounts under Korean VAT law
ledger gl_account must match the generator's account determination table for its (scenario, side, subtype); post-hoc gl_account rewriting necessarily breaks this
semantic_account_subtype must carry meaning, not the 'standard_account' placeholder
ledger is_suspense_account must agree with the CoA flag for the same account
no postings to padding accounts named like 'Cash 4'; real charts of accounts have no serial-numbered names
every gl_account used by the ledger must exist in chart_of_accounts.json
accounts posted to must have distinct names; duplicates leave an auditor no basis to tell them apart
semantic_account_subtype must come from the account determination table's vocabulary; invented labels hide from ACC02, which skips subtypes it does not know

payroll line text must sit on a payroll expense account; regression gate for the defect that started this work (rent account carried 5,145 payroll lines because a post-hoc step rewrote gl_account and left the text)

rules.single_value_single_scenario: non-structural value appears in >=100 documents and >=98% one scenario
rules.exact_timestamp_cluster: exact posting timestamp appears in >=50 documents
rules.scenario_amount_dominance: one exact amount is >=20% of rows in a scenario with >=500 rows

findings.notes: all-column synthetic marker scan for generator fingerprints
single legal-entity journal scope
single-company normal must contain low-volume related-party IC traces without adding extra ledger companies
normal related-party IC must include both receivable/revenue and payable/cost traces
normal related-party IC timing must have populated dates and no stale close-lag pattern
company-code partners are allowed only as related-party trading_partner values on IC rows
single-company normal must not contain company-node graph cycles
normal related-party IC should have a directional population without being entirely one-sided
single-company scope must also hold in master/flow/subledger/balance sidecars
high-line-count batch explainability; missing batch metadata is BLOCKED
normal reversal entries must carry original-document links and net to zero by GL account
financial statement balance artifacts required
financial statement balance artifacts required
financial statement balance artifacts required
financial statement balance artifacts required
financial statement balance artifacts required
financial statement balance artifacts required
financial statement balance artifacts required
[판정 제외 — 항등식 검사, 원판정 PASS] AR/AP/Inventory/FA subledger equals GL control
company-year P&L ratio realism: revenue, COGS, SGA, interest, tax must be economically plausible
account code prefix must match account type and semantic subtype
exported financial statements must have positive revenue, COGS below revenue, and GL rollup mappings
depreciation and amortization expense must have positive net P&L impact by company-year

metric.derivation_policy: diagnostic only: derived tuple still reports CoA/scenario fallback, but PASS requires raw semantic tuple fields to be populated

findings.notes: transaction archetype coverage and joint tuple coherence
expert/LLM fixed-seed stratified sample review artifact

metric.trigger_rule: issued only when a company-period/account has negative normal-side BS balance after monthly roll-forward; line count varies by triggered accounts, not a fixed blanket row pattern

findings.notes: monthly balance reclass trigger diagnostics

metric.basis: period-level P&L reverse balances are diagnostic: returns/discounts, reallocations, reversals, reclass, tax/closing timing can create debit revenue or credit expense in a month without breaking annual closing

findings.notes: income statement reverse-balance diagnostic
new-account company/year/month count variance and empty-cell realism
new-account counterparty diversity
new-account amount heavy-tail realism
new-account woven archetype membership
new-account normal-only label and provenance guard
